description: Comprehensive security, branch, and CI/CD hygiene scan

actions.on_secret_found: BLOCK — alert immediately, do NOT commit or push
actions.on_secret_in_memory: REMOVE from memory files, rotate credential
actions.on_secret_in_config: Move to environment variable or secret manager

patterns_to_scan: API keys (any alphanumeric string >20 chars near 'key', 'token', 'secret')
Codeberg/GitLab/Bitbucket tokens in .netrc or config files

fleet_dispatch.panicbot: immediate alert on any secret detection
fleet_dispatch.rhodibot: auto-redact and create PR to fix

tolerated_branches: gh-pages (only if GitHub Pages is configured)
auto_delete: merged dependabot branches older than 7 days
stale feature branches with no commits in 30 days

dependabot_pr_hygiene.comment_on_close: Closing stale/conflicting dependabot PR. Dependabot will recreate with updated base.
dependabot_pr_hygiene.notes: Dependabot PRs that conflict with main after RSR compliance commits should be closed, not manually resolved. Dependabot recreates them automatically.

fleet_dispatch.finishbot: create PR to delete stale branches, close conflicting dependabot PRs

cicd_pruning.description: Remove or disable CI/CD workflows that consistently fail or are irrelevant to the repo content

disable_if_no_matching_files.codeql.yml: Disable if repo has no supported CodeQL languages (check for .js/.py/.go/.rs/.java/.rb)
disable_if_no_matching_files.jekyll-gh-pages.yml: Disable if no _config.yml or Jekyll content
disable_if_no_matching_files.jekyll.yml: Disable if no _config.yml or Jekyll content

codeql_language_detection..rs: rust (NOT supported by CodeQL — use actions only)

fleet_dispatch.rhodibot: auto-fix CodeQL language matrix based on repo content
fleet_dispatch.finishbot: create PR to disable irrelevant workflows
